final:
module divider_4bit (  
    input clk,  
    input [3:0] dividend,  
    input [3:0] divisor,  
    output reg [3:0] quotient,  
    output reg [3:0] remainder,  
    output reg valid  
);  
    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (divisor == 0) begin quotient <= 4'b0000 ; remainder <= 4'b0000 ; end else begin quotient <= dividend / divisor ; remainder <= dividend % divisor ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  valid <= 1 ;
  end  
endmodule
